creator: kurt.lidl@cello.com
text:
The port for www/p5-CGI-Application-Dispatch is very out of date.
The version in the ports tree is 2.17, which was released in December of 2009.
The current version is 3.0.7, released September of 2011.

How-To-Repeat: Check status here:
http://people.freebsd.org/~mat/perl.html
